success_claim: Downstream-only continuation of the PD-L1 / PD-1 binder hunt: Boltz cofolds declared backbones from an operator-controlled runtime artifact root, then runs jury_synthesis, report, claim_audit, and contract_self_check. Claim level is at most candidate. Generated candidate manifests and structures stay outside git on the runtime volume; the runner's reconstruct_gen_info_from_disk path rebuilds gen_info before the cofold loop.

stages.description: Reconstruct gen_info from runpod-execution/artifacts/design_candidates/<cid>/manifest.json on the runtime volume, then Boltz-cofold every on-disk candidate against the PD-L1 target window. Writes validation/boltz_crosscheck_extended.json and boltz_crosscheck/<cid>/* artifacts. Uses the prebaked boltz conda env from /workspace/software/envs/boltz; --use_msa_server permitted because PD-L1 is public (UniProt Q9NZQ7). No Genie 3 generation in this stage.

Aggregate per-candidate Boltz iPTM/PTM/complex_plddt into candidate_jury.json and candidate_jury.md; sequence-level metadata and a candidate_jury_top32.json shortlist are also emitted when the underlying jury logic has enough signal.
Emit report/README.md and report/index.html summarizing target intake, runtime gate, and the candidate jury. HTML is escaped, no external resources are fetched.

Write claim_ledger.json + claim_ledger.md, methods.md, provenance.md, operator_closeout.md, and artifact_index.json. Claim level is bounded to candidate / insufficient_evidence / blocked; forbidden_claims must remain unasserted.

Verify every candidate marked status=generated has a non-empty structure_path on disk and every candidate marked boltz_status=run has a non-empty prediction_cif_path. Verify claim_level is in the allowed set. Writes validation/contract-self-check.json with ok true on success.

license_gates_required: Boltz (MIT) only; no AlphaFold 3, no licensed prediction tools
ColabFold MSA service public-target-only posture confirmed in operator_closeout
no_false_success_notes: Boltz outputs are predicted models; campaign policy caps Boltz claims at candidate.

This pod does NOT run Genie 3 generation. It consumes operator-declared on-disk backbones from the runtime artifact root. The reconstructed gen_info MUST be persisted as validation/genie3_generation_extended.json by the runner so jury_synthesis can resolve structure_path references.
AlphaFold 3 substitution is forbidden by campaign policy.
